groups: Nothing is on fire. Fire is on things
The word bed looks like a bed
Your future self is watching you
Every book is a remix of the alphabet
You have never seen your own face in person
Lasagna is just a pasta cake
The ocean is just flavored water
Every exit is an entrance somewhere else
You are the oldest you have ever been
Teeth are the only bones you clean daily
Swans can be gay and that is beautiful
History class gets longer every year
Your dog cant tell if you tripped or ran
Coffee is just hot bean water
Elevators are just rooms that move
When you wait for a waiter you are one
Every mirror you buy is used
Sand is called sand because sea and land
Birthdays are good for you the more the
better. People with the most live longest
Sleeping is just time travel
A map is just a spoiler for a trip
Rain is just confetti from the sky
Socks are just shoes for your shoes
Clapping is just hitting yourself
